LanguageData.Mech_CentipedeMissile.label: Missile Centipede
LanguageData.Mech_CentipedeMissile.description: A centipede-class mechanoid equipped with guided missile systems, capable of launching precision HE or EMP warheads at extended ranges to suppress targets with devastating accuracy.
LanguageData.Mech_CentipedeMissile.tools.head.label: head
